message:
web: Use summary field for transcript detail title

Fetch summary from database and display it as the title in the
transcript detail view, falling back to preview if unavailable.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/2e42b6b5-e264-44ca-b73d-55499a215578

files.patch:
@@ -187,6 +187,7 @@ export const getTranscript = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
       transcriptId: transcript.transcriptId,
       source: transcript.source,
       preview: transcript.preview,
+      summary: transcript.summary,
       createdAt: transcript.createdAt,
       updatedAt: transcript.updatedAt,
       unifiedTranscript,
